commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the direct-chat-only guard for quiet channel-owned progress callbacks, updates the dispatch regression test, and adds a Discord proof screenshot file.

PR surface: Source -1, Tests +12, Other 0. Total +11 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source gates quiet native progress callbacks on direct chat only, and the current group regression test asserts those callbacks are suppressed with verbose off; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
